notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Seth Lugo picks off Gunnar Henderson at 1st on throw to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.

notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Samuel Basallo out at 2nd. Jeremiah Jackson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (tag play), call on the field was upheld: pitcher Lucas Erceg picks off Gunnar Henderson at 1st on throw to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.

notableEvents.label: Weston Wilson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Weston Wilson walks. Samuel Basallo to 3rd. Jeremiah Jackson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Leody Taveras grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Leody Taveras hits a grand slam (2) to center field. Samuel Basallo scores. Jeremiah Jackson scores. Weston Wilson scores.

notableEvents.label: Carter Jensen GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carter Jensen grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Salvador Perez out at 2nd. Carter Jensen out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carter Jensen rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carter Jensen grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Salvador Perez out at 2nd. Carter Jensen out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Loftin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin singles on a line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras. Carter Jensen to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nick Loftin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin doubles (2) on a ground ball to left fielder Taylor Ward. Vinnie Pasquantino scores. Salvador Perez scores. Lane Thomas scores.
